mnemonics.title: FATEN Principles
mnemonics.content: Fairness, Accountability, Transparency, Ethics, Non-maleficence - core AI governance pillars

acronyms.usage: EU regulation for data privacy and AI decision-making

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a circular diagram with stages: Design → Develop → Deploy → Monitor → Audit → Update

analogies.analogy: Like building safety inspections - checks system before deployment
